creator: include@npf.deec.uc.pt
text:
Patch to update the www/typo blog engine from 2.6.0 to 4.0.1.

PS: Can someone add me as an FreeBSD Additional Contributor, as you can see:
http://portsmon.freebsd.org/portsconcordanceformaintainer.py?maintainer=include%40npf.pt.freebsd.org
I am already maintainning 4 ports and I have submited some patchs too. :)

http://www.irbs.net/FreeBSD/handbook/contrib-additional.html

Thanks in advance
Francisco Alves Cabrita
